nodes.label: Android xhdpi Launcher Foreground Icon
nodes.description: App launcher foreground icon at xhdpi density (96x96px). Depicts a stylized 'D' shape formed by a thick purple/violet arc on the right side, with two circles (purple at top, pink/red at center) connected by a short vertical bar on the left — evoking a drag-and-drop interaction metaphor consistent with the dragit app name.
